svg.title: AWS Cost Report Generator — architecture diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the main() entrypoint calling AWS client setup, EC2 and RDS input collection, parallel pricing fetches, and Excel report output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the main() function do in this script?')
sendPrompt('How does get_aws_clients() work and what credentials does it use?')
sendPrompt('What inputs does the script collect from the user?')
sendPrompt('How does build_ec2_rows() work and what is ThreadPoolExecutor used for?')
sendPrompt('What is _fetch_ec2_row and how does it call the pricing APIs?')
sendPrompt('What AWS API does fetch_ec2_pricing_api call?')
sendPrompt('What is the Savings Plans API and how is it queried?')
sendPrompt('What is _fetch_rds_row and how does it query the RDS pricing API?')
sendPrompt('How does fetch_rds_price query the AWS pricing API?')
sendPrompt('What does extract_price_from_terms do and when is it used?')
sendPrompt('How does write_excel_report format and style the Excel output?')
